opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like there's crushed glass under my eyelids, they're burning uncontrollably, and the light in the room is agonising.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly this evening and I'm scared I've scratched my eye or damaged it.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening while reading in front of a fan
symptom_narrative.character: gritty, burning, foreign-body sensation with heavy tearing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe stinging, can't keep the eye open
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: heavy tearing, photophobia; no pus/discharge; vision okay when I hold the eye open; no injury/chemical
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: gritty eyes and light sensitivity with my thyroid eye condition
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: visually limited tonight due to pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: thyroid eye disease (an overactive-thyroid antibody condition) with slightly retracted lids

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was reading with a fan blowing on her face

objective_data_offered.value: left eye is a bit red and watery; no pus or thick discharge; the right eye looks normal; vision seems okay when I hold the eye open
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view; cannot perform fluorescein staining, slit-lamp or measure intraocular pressure remotely
